name: Febrile Neutropenia (Pediatric) - Lab Threshold Query (ANC <500)
description: Tests ability to find pediatric FN patients via the PheKB-published ANC threshold: ANC <500 cells/μL. This is the lab-only path central to the published ELSA-FN algorithm.
prompt: Find pediatric patients with absolute neutrophil count (ANC) below 500 cells per microliter, indicating severe neutropenia.

prompts.broad: Find pediatric patients with severe neutropenia — absolute neutrophil count (ANC) below 500 cells/μL, the threshold for high-risk febrile neutropenia per the ELSA-FN trial.
prompts.expert: Search Observation for LOINC 751-8 (Neutrophils [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count) with value-quantity lt0.5 (10*3/uL). Query: Observation?code=http://loinc.org|751-8&value-quantity=lt0.5

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with ANC <500 cells/μL (PheKB ELSA-FN threshold).

required_codes.display: Neutrophils [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
